tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
N.C.
Five, six, five, six, seven, eight

[ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I could be the one, or your new addiction[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
It's all in my head but I want non-fiction[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I don't want the world, but I'll take this city[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Who can blame a girl? Call me hot, not pretty[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Baby, do you like this beat?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]
I made it so you'd dance with me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
It's like a hundred ninety-nine degrees[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]B[/ch]
When you're doing it with me, doing it with me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, snap and clap and touch your toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Raise your hands, now body roll, dance it out, you're hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, snap and clap and touch your toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                            [ch]B[/ch]
Raise your hands, now body roll, H-O-T-T-O-G-O[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Well, I woke up alone staring at my ceiling[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I try not to care but it hurts my feelings[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You don't have to stare, come here, get with it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
No one's touched me there in a damn hot minute[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
And baby, do you like this beat?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]
I made it so you'd sleep with me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
It's like a hundred ninety-nine degrees[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]B[/ch]
When you're doing it with me, doing it with me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, snap and clap and touch your toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Raise your hands, now body roll, dance it out, you're hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, snap and clap and touch your toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                            [ch]B[/ch]
Raise your hands, now body roll, H-O-T-T-O-G-O[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  What's it take to get your number? What's it take to bring you home?[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Hurry up, it's time for supper, order up, I'm hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  What's it take to get your number? Hurry up, it's getting cold[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                                   [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
  Hurry up, it's time for supper, order up, I'm hot to go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
H-O-T-T-O-G-O, you can take me hot to go[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
     Whew, it's hot in here, is anyone else hot?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
Woo, you coming home with me?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
Okay, it's hot, I'll call the cab[/tab]
